titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Forestry and Environmental Studies, Yale University, Records Concerning the Industrial Forestry Seminar
School of Forestry and Environmental Studies, Yale University, Records Concerning the Industrial Forestry Seminar
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday January 7, 2019 at 08:05
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: School of Forestry and Environmental Studies, Yale University, records concerning the industrial forestry seminar
did.abstract: The records consist of papers and materials from seminars and files from seminar instructors documenting the Industrial Forestry Seminar conducted by the Yale School of Forestry and Environmental Studies (called the School of Forestry prior to 1972).

corpname.part: Yale University. School of Forestry and Environmental Studies

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 24-E (YRG 24-E), Records of departments, offices, programs, and projects of the Yale School of Forestry.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the School of Forestry and Environmental Studies, 1982.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Forestry and Environmental Studies, Yale University, Records Concerning the Industrial Forestry Seminar (RU 44). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged in two series: I. Industrial Forestry Seminar Records, 1955-1979. II. Seminar Instructors, 1955-1971.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of papers and materials from seminars and files from seminar instructors documenting the Industrial Forestry Seminar conducted by the Yale School of Forestry and Environmental Studies (called the School of Forestry prior to 1972).

did.unittitle: Records of the Industrial Forestry Seminar
